problem_statement: The current plan page stacks scheduling add-meal recipes imports and shopping into one long page. On phone this creates too much context switching inside one scroll path, and on tablet it still underuses the available width.
in_scope: Add panel query state with schedule recipes and shopping modes and default to schedule
Render a segmented phone switcher so only one primary plan panel is visible at a time

Keep calendar and add-meal inside schedule move recipe and import controls into recipes move manual add and shopping list into shopping and render recipes plus shopping side by side below schedule on tablet
requirements: The plan panel state is deep-linkable through the URL
Phone plan layout shows one primary panel at a time
Tablet layout keeps recipes and shopping visible without recreating the current long stacked page
acceptance_criteria: Visiting /plan without a panel param renders the schedule view
Recipes and shopping no longer appear below the phone schedule panel by default
Tablet width shows recipes and shopping in parallel cards below the schedule section
risks: Segmented state may feel unstable if it is stored only in client state instead of the route
implementation_notes: Use searchParams in src/app/(app)/plan/page.tsx for panel state. Update src/components/RecipeLibrarySection.tsx and responsive plan layout styles in src/app/globals.css to match the new structure.
